creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, thank you very much for your submission. Sadly we can only accept 
English submissions. Foreign languages cannot be handled by us, but 
there are a few localized lists available. So please send the submission 
in English so that we can help you, or try a local platform. Thank you 
for using FreeBSD!
